channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping, 31st May

item.title: Overcrowded Lime hire Bikes Parked dangerously, 31st May
item.description:
Overcrowded Lime hire Bikes Parked dangerously on a busy Parking bay on Little Newport Street opposite Hippodrome Casino.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge Dumped here, 31st May
item.description:
A Fridge has been dumped here, Can Council Attend and remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Victoria Road, Southborough, Greater London

item.title: A growing pile of rubbish, 31st May

Keeps getting added to

item.title: Excessive littering on Tyler street, 31st May
item.description:
The pavements , road, and gutter on Tyler street (the whole way from trafalger Road to the Green) has excessive littering.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tyler Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised paving stone At the junction of Adys Road with Nutbrook Street, 31st May
item.description:
This lifted paving stone has been here for about two weeks, my wife tripped over it and almost hurt herself, and I've just tripped over it to.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Adys Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
